title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mastech Holdings in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
